idea-plugin.name: AI File Janitor
idea-plugin.description:
AI File Janitor / AI 文件清道夫

Keep your project clean. This plugin scans a project (great right after you import it) and classifies files into categories using heuristics plus an optional AI model (any OpenAI-compatible API):

  • AI-generated junk — useless files left behind by AI tools → delete.
  • Temporary files — *.tmp, *.bak, caches, OS junk → delete.
  • Project / AI config files — *.cursorrules, tsconfig.json, etc. → move into an ignored & excluded folder.
  • Suspicious / unknown files → one-click archive to a chosen directory, or one-click delete.

Configure your API Key and Base URL in Settings → Tools → AI File Janitor.

action.description: Scan project for AI-generated, temporary, config and suspicious files
